{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/102285601?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jqr1449186277/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jqr1449186277/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jqr1449186277/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jqr1449186277/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/jqr1449186277", "id": 102285601, "login": "jqr1449186277", "node_id": "U_kgDOBhjBIQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jqr1449186277/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jqr1449186277/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jqr1449186277/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jqr1449186277/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jqr1449186277/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/jqr1449186277", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-54244", "cvss": {"score": 3.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 3.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "### Impact

The Live Preview endpoint for existing entries and terms only checked view authorization, but it accepts and renders caller-supplied field values. A Control Panel user with view but not edit permission could therefore submit content they were not authorized to author and generate a shareable Live Preview URL rendering it.

### Patches

This has been fixed in 5.74.0 and 6.20.3.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00303, "percentile": 0.22219}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-7mqq-4v55-88gh", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-26T23:10:37Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7mqq-4v55-88gh", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-7mqq-4v55-88gh"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54244"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-26T23:10:37Z", "references": ["https://github.com/statamic/cms/security/advisories/GHSA-7mqq-4v55-88gh", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7mqq-4v55-88gh"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/statamic/cms/security-advisories/GHSA-7mqq-4v55-88gh", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/statamic/cms", "summary": "Statamic CMS's incorrect authorization lets view-only users submit Live Preview content reserved for editors", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-26T23:10:39Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-7mqq-4v55-88gh", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.74.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "statamic/cms"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 5.74.0"}, {"first_patched_version": "6.20.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "statamic/cms"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 6.0.0, < 6.20.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Statamic CMS's incorrect authorization lets view-only users submit Live Preview content reserved for editors
